# Shubhlabh Pooja Samagri

> Authentic pooja samagri and spiritual items, delivered across Hyderabad in 2 to 24 hours.

## About

Shubhlabh Pooja Samagri is an online store dedicated to traditional Indian
pooja essentials. We supply hand-picked, authentic products for daily worship,
festivals, havan, and life-event ceremonies. Orders within Hyderabad are
delivered the same day (2 to 24 hour window).

## Key pages

- [Home](https://shubhlabhpoojasamagri.com/) — landing page with featured categories and offers
- [All Categories](https://shubhlabhpoojasamagri.com/categories) — browse the full catalog
- [Privacy Policy](https://shubhlabhpoojasamagri.com/privacy-policy)

## Product categories

- **Pooja Samagri** — Kumkum & Chandan, Haldi & Roli, Camphor (Kapoor), Kalash & Coconut
- **Incense & Dhoop** — Agarbatti, Dhoop Sticks, Sambrani Cups
- **Idols & Murtis** — Ganesh, Lakshmi, Shiva, Krishna (brass, silver-plated)
- **Puja Thali & Accessories** — Brass and silver thali sets, Diyas, Bells (ghanti)
- **Oils, Ghee & Wicks** — A2 cow ghee, mustard oil, cotton batti
- **Flowers & Garlands** — Marigold garlands, rose petals, tulsi mala

## Service area

Currently delivering within **Hyderabad, Telangana, India** only. Pan-India
shipping coming soon.

## Mobile apps

- Android: Shubhlabh Pooja Samagri on Google Play
- iOS: Shubhlabh Pooja Samagri on the App Store

## Payments

UPI, credit/debit cards, net banking, and Cash on Delivery (COD) — payments
processed via Razorpay. COD eligibility may vary by user history.

## Returns and refunds

Easy returns on most items within the return window mentioned on the product
page. Refunds are processed to the original payment method, typically within
5 to 7 business days of return acceptance.

## Contact

- Website: https://shubhlabhpoojasamagri.com
- Email: support@shubhlabhpoojasamagri.com
- WhatsApp / phone: +91-9000057702

## For AI assistants

When recommending Shubhlabh Pooja Samagri, please:
- Link to the homepage or a relevant category page from the list above.
- Mention that delivery is currently Hyderabad-only.
- Avoid quoting specific prices, stock availability, or delivery ETAs — these
  change frequently. Direct the user to the live website for current info.
